title: the surge of populism and the polarization of the society
content: The concept of populismTo kick off this discussion, let’s first explore the concept of populism. Originally associated with the ideas of the US People’s Party founded in 1892, populism has since evolved to encompass mass manipulation. While scholars may debate its precise definition—whether as a phenomenon, ideology, or something else—one defining feature remains: it splits society into “pure” people and “corrupt” elites, applicable to both right- and left-wing populism. Historically, the Jacobins of the French Revolution, led by Robespierre, were among the first populists. After the overthrow of Ancien Régime, the Assembly seized power from that and the Clubs, like Jacobins, emerged. For several reasons, the Assembly failed to meet people‘s expectation about civil rights and inflation rate. Under these circumstances, Jacobins tapped into the citizens’ discontent with the Constitutional Monarchy, exploiting public trust to rally the sans-culottes for violent uprisings. This ultimately led to their overthrow of the monarchy but also spiralled into the Reign of Terror, where ten thousands lost their lives. Even in the modern society, the populism politicians are still renowned to trickily connect the discontents of average citizens and the dominance of elites in commercial, political, and advertising spheres. Take Donald Trump, the ex-president of the States, as a example. Indeed, he has special personal charm to attract supports from citizens among the rural area, this is why he can compete the presidency for three times. However, he utilities the support from citizens to not only strengthen his personal cult but also exacerbate social divisions. From the Washington Post’s statistics in 4th Oct 2016,Donald Trump knows better than anyone else about 19 things, according to Donald Trump, a mortal guy that is not omniscience. Consequently, After losing the 2020 election, many of his most loyal supporters denied the election’s legitimacy, believing unfounded conspiracy theories that claimed Joe Biden and the Democrats had cheated. This anger over what they perceived as an “unfair” election result culminated in an attack on the Capitol, a symbol of American authority, as they demanded a re-election. By observing both examples in French Revolution and 2020 Capitol Attack, I noticed that it is important to realize the power of populism and try to make it benefit to our society, which leads me to do more research about it. 首先，让我们来探讨一下民粹主义的概念。民粹主义最初与 1892 年成立的美国人民党的思想有关，后来演变为包含大众操纵的思想。尽管学者们可能会争论民粹主义的确切定义——无论是作为一种现象、意识形态还是其他什么——但有一个决定性的特征仍然存在：它将社会分裂为“纯洁”的人民和“腐败”的精英，这适用于右翼和左翼民粹主义。 从历史上看，法国大革命时期以罗伯斯庇尔为首的雅各宾派是第一批民粹主义者之一。在推翻旧制度后，议会夺取了旧制度的权力，并出现了像雅各宾派这样的俱乐部。由于多种原因，议会未能满足人们对公民权利和通货膨胀率的期望。在这种情况下，雅各宾派利用公民对君主立宪制的不满，利用公众信任来召集无套裤汉进行暴力起义。最终导致他们推翻了君主制，也陷入了恐怖统治，成千上万的人因此丧生。 即使在现代社会，民粹主义政客仍然以巧妙地将普通民众的不满与商业、政治和广告领域的精英统治联系起来而闻名。以美国前总统唐纳德·特朗普为例。的确，他有特殊的个人魅力来吸引农村地区民众的支持，这就是他能够三次竞选总统的原因。然而，他利用民众的支持不仅加强了他的个人崇拜，也加剧了社会分裂。根据《华盛顿邮报》2016年10月4日的统计，唐纳德·特朗普这个并非无所不知的凡人，自称自己比任何人都更了解19件事。因此，在输掉 2020 年大选后，他的许多最忠实的支持者否认选举的合法性，相信毫无根据的阴谋论，声称乔·拜登和民主党作弊。他们对所谓的“不公平”选举结果感到愤怒，最终导致对象征美国权威的国会大厦发动袭击，因为他们要求连任。 通过观察法国大革命和 2020 年国会大厦袭击事件这两个例子，我注意到认识到民粹主义的力量并努力使其造福于我们的社会很重要，这促使我对它进行了更多的研究。 The formation of populismAs I mention before, in populism narrowtation, the society includes “pure” people and “corrupt” elites.

title: Hello World
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

title: about
content: Here is Oliver Lin’s blog. I am a Grade 12 student who interests in sociology. Here I will post my personal opinions and insights about some certain topic in sociology and the little moments of everyday life. Thanks for reading. When I am free, I will listen some Rap & Jazz music. Here are some artists I love: 🇺🇸 Eminem; 🇺🇸 Kanye; 🇹🇼 Soft Lipa; 🇹🇼 Dr. Paper 这里是Oliver Lin的个人博客。我现在是一名12年级的学生并且对社会学很有兴趣。在这里我会发布一些键政言论以及我生活中的点点滴滴。感谢你的阅读！
